snapshot.description: Unify the typography, sizes, weights, and HSL color tailoring of all Stats Grid card headers inside StatsGrid.tsx, introducing modern colorful micro-dots to match each card's thematic focus.
snapshot.title: Redesign Stats card headers for premium visual cohesiveness
